inputs.label: Daily Acts of Gratitude
inputs.businessContext: Number of gratitude practices performed per day

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of gratitude practices performed per day
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pratiques de gratitude effectuées par jour
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de prácticas de gratitud realizadas por día

inputs.label: Days Practiced
inputs.businessContext: Total days gratitude practice has been maintained

businessContext_i18n.en: Total days gratitude practice has been maintained
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şükran pratiğinin sürdürüldüğü toplam gün sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Tage, an denen die Dankbarkeitspraxis aufrechterhalten wurde
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de jours où la pratique de la gratitude a été maintenue
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de días que se ha mantenido la práctica de gratitud

businessContext_i18n.fr: Intensité auto-évaluée de l'expérience de gratitude (1=faible, 10=élevée)
businessContext_i18n.es: Intensidad autoevaluada de la experiencia de gratitud (1=baja, 10=alta)

inputs.label: Social Shares
inputs.businessContext: Number of times gratitude is expressed to others per day

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times gratitude is expressed to others per day
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günde başkalarına ifade edilen şükran sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der täglichen Dankbarkeitsbekundungen gegenüber anderen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fois où la gratitude est exprimée aux autres par jour
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de veces que se expresa gratitud a otros por día

inputs.label: Journal Entries
inputs.businessContext: Number of gratitude journal entries per day

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of gratitude journal entries per day
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günde yapılan şükran günlüğü kaydı sayısı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'entrées de journal de gratitude par jour
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de entradas en el diario de gratitud por día

inputs.label: Baseline Happiness
inputs.businessContext: Self-rated happiness level before starting practice

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-rated happiness level before starting practice
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pratiğe başlamadan önceki öz bildirim mutluluk seviyesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Selbstbewertetes Glücksniveau vor Beginn der Übung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de bonheur auto-évalué avant de commencer la pratique
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de felicidad autoevaluado antes de comenzar la práctica

breakdown: gratitude_score: Total gratitude actions weighted by intensity
social_impact: Effect of sharing gratitude with others
reflection_depth: Depth of gratitude reflection through journaling
happiness_gain: Estimated increase in happiness level
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
